_description: BusinessData — Risk items (PK: TENANT#<tenantId>#PROJECT#<projectId>, SK: RISK#<riskId>)

items.title: Equipment supplier delivery delay
items.description: The primary supplier for water quality testing kits has delayed shipment by 2 weeks. This impacts the monitoring milestone timeline.
items.mitigation: Evaluate alternative supplier in District 7. Higher cost but faster delivery. Get quote by July 15.

items.title: Equipment budget overrun
items.description: Equipment costs may exceed budget due to supplier price increases and the need to procure from alternative suppliers at premium pricing.
items.mitigation: Reallocate $5,000 from volunteer coordination budget. Negotiate bulk pricing with alternative supplier.

items.title: Volunteer attrition during summer months
items.description: Historical data shows 30-40% volunteer drop-off during peak summer heat. May impact planting event attendance.
items.mitigation: Schedule early morning events. Provide hydration stations. Maintain waitlist of backup volunteers.

items.title: Typhoon season impact on planting sites
items.description: Typhoon season (August–November) may damage newly planted seedlings and delay planting activities.
items.mitigation: Prioritize planting before typhoon season. Install protective barriers. Monitor weather forecasts closely.

items.title: Funding gap for Q3 operations
items.description: Donor funding for Q3 has not been confirmed. May need to scale back cleanup operations if funds are not secured by August.
items.mitigation: Submit grant applications to 3 additional donors. Prepare scaled-down operational plan as contingency.
